name: pipeline-migration
description: > Migrate Synapse Data Factory pipeline artifacts to Microsoft Fabric Data Factory. Handles: linked services → Fabric connections, dataset definitions inlined into pipeline activities, global parameters → Variable Libraries, SynapseNotebook activities → TridentNotebook. SSIS, SHIR-only, and Databricks activities are parked. Use when: (1) migrating Synapse pipelines to Fabric Data Factory, (2) converting SynapseNotebook activities to TridentNotebook, (3) translating linked services to Fabric conn
author: microsoft
